summary: Iteration 11 testing completed. All features verified: Back button on all pages (PublicLayout, AdminLayout, DashboardLayout), 'Need Beats or Instrumentals?' section with purple gradient on landing page, no red line in sidebar menu, Object Storage uploads, Stripe checkout, and release CRUD operations. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/releases/{id}/cover uploads cover art to Object Storage
Frontend: Homepage shows KALMORI logo in pink/purple
Frontend: Homepage has hamburger menu on left, no back button
Frontend: Pricing page has back button on left, page title centered, hamburger on right
Frontend: 'Need Beats or Instrumentals?' section visible with purple gradient
Frontend: Dashboard layout has back button on mobile (lg:hidden)
Frontend: Admin layout has back button on mobile (lg:hidden)
Frontend: Sidebar menu has no red line
seed_data_creation: Test releases created during testing (TEST_Iteration11_Release, TEST_Upload_Release, TEST_Payment_Release)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 features verified working: Back button appears on all pages except homepage (PublicLayout shows ← arrow + page title, AdminLayout and DashboardLayout show back button on mobile with lg:hidden). Landing page has 'Need Beats or Instrumentals?' section with purple gradient. No red line in sidebar menu. Object Storage and Stripe integrations working. Previous test files: iteration_1 through iteration_10.

mocked_apis.PayPal: Runs in sandbox simulation mode - no API keys configured
mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key) but password reset tokens are stored in DB

back_button.public_layout: Back button on left for all pages except homepage, page title centered, hamburger menu moves to right
back_button.admin_layout: Back button visible on mobile (lg:hidden) with page title
back_button.dashboard_layout: Back button visible on mobile (lg:hidden) with page title

landing_page.kalmori_logo: Animated pink/purple KALMORI logo in header
landing_page.need_beats_section: Purple gradient section with 'Need Beats or Instrumentals?' heading and REQUEST A BEAT button

sidebar_menu.red_line_removed: No red line/border in sidebar menu

object_storage.cover_upload: POST /api/releases/{id}/cover uploads to Emergent Object Storage

releases.create: POST /api/releases creates release with auto-generated UPC
